response:
Sec. 1  
Allergies to peanuts are immune system reactions to proteins found in peanuts  
These reactions can cause symptoms ranging from mild itching to severe anaphylaxis  
Living underwater does not eliminate exposure to peanut proteins  
People with peanut allergies must avoid peanut containing foods regardless of their environment  

Sec. 2  
Underwater living is not a practical solution for managing allergies  
Allergies are not affected by environmental changes such as water or pressure  
Medical treatment and avoidance strategies are necessary for managing peanut allergies  
Living underwater does not provide any benefit in preventing allergic reactions to peanuts
